positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandalic illustration inspired by stained glass windows. The central theme is interconnected flora and fauna, rendered in jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, ruby). Intricate patterns, geometric symmetry, decorative art style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy, loose brushstrokes, cartoonish
